# Support Guidelines

Thank you for using Smart Chess! If you encounter issues, please check these resources:

## 🔍 Troubleshooting Guide
Read [Troubleshooting Guide](docs/Troubleshooting.md) for solutions to common issues (e.g. Stockfish detection, Pygame audio failures, Tkinter rendering issues on Windows).

## 💬 Question Templates
If you want to ask a question, please raise a GitHub issue using our **Question Template**.

## 👥 Project Contributors
For direct project support or issues regarding LAN deployment, feel free to reach out to:
- **Mohammad Sufiyan Aasim** (`SufiyanAasim`)
- **Taha Siddiqui** (`13eeCoder`)
